title: stddev_samp returns unexpected value
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t3 (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, value DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT VARIANCE(value) AS variance_value, STDDEV_SAMP(value) AS stddev_value FROM t3 WHERE value > 0;
SELECT AVG(value) AS average_value FROM t3 WHERE created_at >= '2025-01-01';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t3 WHERE value IS NULL;
key_bug_features: STDDEV_SAMP returns value greater than VARIANCE result
